summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Skroutz Price Calculator. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%) and all frontend UI tests passed. The app correctly implements Excel file upload, product search by name/EAN, and price calculation with FBS and Marketplace breakdowns.
seed_data_creation: Data was pre-loaded via curl. 589 report_listed products and 588 FBS products are in the database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_skroutz_api.py. Product UID 6841355 (Natural Doctor Complete D3) is good for calculation testing with MP 8.6% and FBS fee 0.59€. The expected FBS price for cost=10, profit=0.90, vat=24% is 16.11€.

features_verified.upload_report_listed: Endpoint exists and returns 422 without file (expected)
features_verified.upload_fbs_products: Endpoint exists and returns 422 without file (expected)
features_verified.upload_status: Returns correct counts: 589 report_listed, 588 FBS products
features_verified.product_lookup: Works - GET /api/products/{uid} returns full product data
features_verified.calculate_endpoint: Works - Returns correct FBS (16.11€) and Marketplace prices
features_verified.result_cards: FBS and Marketplace price cards display with full breakdowns
